name: HR WORKS
description: Access HR WORKS, the German HR/payroll platform: employees, absences, sick leaves, remote work (home office), working times, projects, applicants, organization units, holidays and cost centers via the v2 REST API.
instructions:
This connector uses the HR WORKS v2 REST API (https://developers.hrworks.de).

**Authentication model — IMPORTANT**: HR WORKS does not use a long-lived API key. Instead, you POST `{accessKey, secretAccessKey}` to `/v2/authentication` and receive a short-lived JWT (valid 15 minutes) which is then sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on every subsequent call. This adapter stores a single bearer token (`HRWORKS_TOKEN`) supplied by you.

**Getting a token** (run before importing the connector, then again whenever the token expires):

```bash
curl -X POST https://api.hrworks.de/v2/authentication \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"accessKey":"YOUR_ACCESS_KEY","secretAccessKey":"YOUR_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY"}'
```

The response contains `{"token": "eyJ..."}` — paste that JWT as `HRWORKS_TOKEN` when importing.

**Token lifetime**: ~15 minutes. After expiration the API will reject calls with 401; you must mint a new token and re-import or update the connector. For long-running workflows, consider wrapping this adapter in a custom proxy that refreshes tokens automatically.

**Sandbox**: HR WORKS provides a demo environment at `https://api.demo-hrworks.de`. Set `HRWORKS_BASE_URL=https://api.demo-hrworks.de` to test against demo data; otherwise the production endpoint `https://api.hrworks.de` is used.

**Identifiers**: most person-related endpoints accept either the HR WORKS personnel number or the HR WORKS username. Use the optional `personIdentifierType` / `usePersonnelNumbers` parameters when the identifier you have on hand is not the default.

**Date intervals**: most listing endpoints (absences, sick leaves, working times, remote work) require ISO `YYYY-MM-DD` `beginDate`/`endDate` — maximum span is one year (or 31 days if `interval=days`).

**Pagination**: page size is 50; the API returns a `Link` header with next/prev URLs. Pass `page` to step through results.

**Rate limit**: HR WORKS imposes per-tenant rate limits — see their developer portal for details.

tools.name: hrworks_health_check
tools.description: Check whether the HR WORKS API is reachable. Returns 200 OK with no body. Useful for connector validation; does not require authentication.

tools.name: hrworks_list_organization_units
tools.description: List all active organization units (Organisationseinheiten) of the company with their uuid, number and name.

tools.name: hrworks_get_organization_unit
tools.description: Return the data of a specific organization unit. Pass the unit's uuid (preferred) or its number (deprecated).

uuid.description: The uuid (preferred) or number of the organization unit.

tools.name: hrworks_list_present_persons
tools.description: List all persons currently 'in the office' for a given organization unit. Accounts for vacations, trips, sicknesses and other absences (forenoon/afternoon).

number.description: Number/ID of the organization unit to inspect.

tools.name: hrworks_list_permanent_establishments
tools.description: List all permanent establishments (Betriebsstätten) of the company with id and name.

tools.name: hrworks_list_holidays
tools.description: List company holidays for a given year and (optionally) country. Country codes are ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 (e.g. DEU, AUT, CHE).

countryCodes.description: Optional ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country codes to filter by (e.g. ['DEU']).

permanentEstablishments.description: Optional list of permanent establishment IDs.

tools.name: hrworks_list_persons
tools.description: List all persons (employees) in the company. By default only active employees are returned. Optionally filter by organization unit.

organizationUnits.description: Filter by one or more organization unit identifiers.

onlyActive.description: If false, also returns persons that have left the company (default: true).

onlyActiveOrganizationUnits.description: If false, also returns persons assigned to deactivated org units (default: true).

identifierType.description: Type of identifier in organizationUnits ('number' or 'uuid'). Default 'number'.

tools.name: hrworks_get_person
tools.description: Return the base data of a specific person (employee). The personIdentifier defaults to the personnel number; pass personIdentifierType='username' or 'personId' to use a different identifier.

personIdentifier.description: Personnel number (default), HR WORKS username or personId of the person.

tools.name: hrworks_list_persons_master_data
tools.description: Return the current master data (full personal data, contract details, addresses, bank info, etc.) for one or more persons. Page size is 50.

persons.description: List of person identifiers to fetch. If omitted, returns master data for all active persons.

onlyActive.description: If false, also returns persons that have left the company (default: true).

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_get_persons_today
tools.description: Return day-related objects (working hours, attendance, absences) for the current day for one or more persons.

persons.description: List of person identifiers. If omitted, returns data for all active persons.

onlyActive.description: If false, also returns persons that have left the company (default: true).

includeData.description: Optional list of data sources to include (e.g. workingTimes, absences). Target working hours and holidays are always included.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_get_leave_account
tools.description: Return the leave account (vacation balance) of a single person up to a reference date. The interval starts at January 1st of the reference year.

personnelNumber.description: HR WORKS personnel number of the person.

referenceDate.description: Reference date (YYYY-MM-DD). If omitted, defaults to today.

tools.name: hrworks_list_absences
tools.description: List absences (vacation, parental leave, etc.) for one or more persons over a date interval. Required: beginDate and endDate (YYYY-MM-DD, max 1-year span).

persons.description: Optional list of HR WORKS usernames (or personnel numbers if usePersonnelNumbers=true).

types.description: Optional absence type keys to filter by (see hrworks_list_absence_types).

count.description: If true, return cumulated working-day counts per absence type instead of details.

usePersonnelNumbers.description: If true, treat 'persons' values as personnel numbers (default: false → usernames).

onlyActive.description: If false, includes persons who have left the company.

statusFilter.description: Optional list of absence statuses to filter by (e.g. APPROVED, PENDING).

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_list_absence_types
tools.description: List all absence types (vacation, parental leave, special leave, etc.) configured for the customer account, with their keys for use as filter values.

onlyActive.description: If true, only currently active absence types are returned.

tools.name: hrworks_list_vacation_types
tools.description: List vacation types defined for the customer account (subset of absence types focused on vacation/leave).

tools.name: hrworks_list_sick_leaves
tools.description: List sick leaves (Krankheitstage) for one or more persons over a date interval. Required: beginDate and endDate (YYYY-MM-DD, max 1-year span).

persons.description: Optional list of HR WORKS usernames (or personnel numbers if usePersonnelNumbers=true).

types.description: Optional sick leave type keys to filter by.

count.description: If true, return cumulated working-day counts per type instead of details.

usePersonnelNumbers.description: If true, treat 'persons' values as personnel numbers.

onlyActive.description: If false, includes persons who have left the company.

statusFilter.description: Optional list of sick leave statuses to filter by.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_list_sick_leave_types
tools.description: List all sick leave types configured for the customer account with their keys (used as filter values for hrworks_list_sick_leaves).

tools.name: hrworks_list_remote_work
tools.description: List remote work / home office records for one or more persons over a date interval. Required: beginDate and endDate (YYYY-MM-DD, max 1-year span).

persons.description: Optional list of HR WORKS usernames (or personnel numbers if usePersonnelNumbers=true).

usePersonnelNumbers.description: If true, treat 'persons' values as personnel numbers.

onlyActive.description: If false, includes persons who have left the company.

statusFilter.description: Optional list of statuses to filter by.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_list_working_times
tools.description: List logged working times (project time tracking) for one or more persons over a date interval. Only persons with a configured time tracking regulation in the requested interval are returned.

persons.description: Optional list of HR WORKS usernames (or personnel numbers if usePersonnelNumbers=true).

types.description: Optional working time types to filter by (see hrworks_list_time_recording_regulations).

usePersonnelNumbers.description: If true, treat 'persons' values as personnel numbers.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_list_time_recording_regulations
tools.description: List all time-recording regulations configured for the customer (defines which working time types are allowed per regulation).

tools.name: hrworks_list_projects
tools.description: List time-tracking projects of the company.

tools.name: hrworks_get_project
tools.description: Return the data of a specific time-tracking project by id.

tools.name: hrworks_list_project_customers
tools.description: List the customers used for project time tracking.

tools.name: hrworks_list_job_applications
tools.description: List job applications. Optionally filter by post id and/or status.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

posts.description: Optional list of post ids to filter by.

statusFilter.description: Optional list of application status identifiers to filter by.

tools.name: hrworks_list_posts
tools.description: List all recruiting posts (job postings) of the company.

onlyActive.description: If false, also returns inactive posts (default: true).

tools.name: hrworks_get_post
tools.description: Return the data of a single recruiting post by uuid.

uuid.description: The uuid (preferred) or id of the post.

tools.name: hrworks_list_applicants
tools.description: List applicants (only those with at least one job application). Optionally filter by status.

statusFilter.description: Optional list of application statuses to filter by.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).

tools.name: hrworks_get_applicant
tools.description: Return data of a specific applicant by uuid. The uuid does not change when the applicant is converted to an employee.

tools.name: hrworks_list_cost_centers
tools.description: List all cost centers (Kostenstellen) of the company with their number/id and name.

tools.name: hrworks_list_cost_objectives
tools.description: List all cost objectives (Kostenträger) of the company.

tools.name: hrworks_list_wage_salary_types
tools.description: List all wage/salary types defined for the customer account (used in payroll exports).

tools.name: hrworks_list_travel_expense_reports
tools.description: List travel expense reports (Reisekostenabrechnungen). Pass optional date and person filters.

usePersonnelNumbers.description: If true, treat 'persons' values as personnel numbers.

page.description: Page number for paginated results (page size 50).
